preview.summary: Czech Republic, back at a World Cup for the first time since 2006, meet a settled South Africa side in a Group A clash both will see as winnable. Expect Czech directness through their target man against Bafana Bafana's disciplined, possession-recycling approach under Hugo Broos.
preview.homeForm: Czech Republic, ranked around 41st, qualified via the UEFA playoffs with dramatic shootout wins and have won three of their last five.
preview.awayForm: South Africa, ranked around 60th, topped a tight CAF group ahead of Nigeria with 18 points to reach their first World Cup since 2010.
preview.homeKey: Patrik Schick, Bayer Leverkusen striker and prolific national-team scorer.
preview.awayKey: Lyle Foster, Burnley forward and the squad's biggest name.
storylines: Czech Republic's first World Cup appearance in 20 years
Hugo Broos chases a knockout berth with a settled Bafana squad
Captain Ronwen Williams' penalty-saving reputation could prove decisive
preview.h2h: The two nations have rarely met, with no significant competitive history between them.
